ticket.subject: Login credentials not working
ticket.description: I cannot login with my credentials. Keep getting authentication failure message which is urgent

ticket.subject: Application error on launch
ticket.description: App shows error code 500 on startup. This is blocking my important work

ticket.subject: Billing invoice missing
ticket.description: Did not receive monthly invoice for payment processing

ticket.subject: Request for export feature
ticket.description: Would love to have bulk export functionality as an enhancement suggestion

ticket.subject: Form validation bug
ticket.description: Submit button not working. Bug can be reproduced with these defect steps

ticket.subject: Password reset email not received
ticket.description: Tried password reset but email never arrives. Cannot access account

ticket.subject: Production server crash
ticket.description: Critical production down situation. Server crashed and affecting all users

ticket.subject: Double charged on payment
ticket.description: Was charged twice for same invoice. Need refund for duplicate billing

ticket.subject: Dark theme feature request
ticket.description: Suggestion to add dark mode theme option for better user experience

ticket.subject: Image upload defect
ticket.description: Cannot upload images. Getting error with reproduction steps that show bug

ticket.subject: Minor cosmetic issue
ticket.description: Small UI spacing issue on settings page. Low priority cosmetic problem

ticket.subject: Security vulnerability detected
ticket.description: Found critical security flaw in authentication. Needs urgent attention immediately

ticket.subject: Invoice format inquiry
ticket.description: Need different invoice format for billing compliance purposes

ticket.subject: Batch import feature
ticket.description: Feature request for batch import capability to improve workflow

ticket.subject: Data loss bug
ticket.description: Data disappears after save. Can reproduce this defect consistently

ticket.subject: Account locked issue
ticket.description: Account locked after failed login attempts. Need access restored

ticket.subject: Performance degradation
ticket.description: System running slow with error messages appearing frequently

ticket.subject: Payment method update
ticket.description: How to change billing payment method in account settings

ticket.subject: API rate limit enhancement
ticket.description: Request to increase API limits as enhancement suggestion

ticket.subject: Validation error bug
ticket.description: Form showing validation error incorrectly. Bug needs fixing with proper reproduction

ticket.subject: Email change not saving
ticket.description: Cannot update email address in account profile settings

ticket.subject: Memory leak crash
ticket.description: Application crashes after extended use. Critical error affecting production

ticket.subject: Subscription billing question
ticket.description: Question about renewal date and billing cycle timing

ticket.subject: Mobile app suggestion
ticket.description: Enhancement request for mobile application version of platform

ticket.subject: Report calculation defect
ticket.description: Numbers in report dont add up correctly. Bug in calculation logic

ticket.subject: Two-factor auth setup
ticket.description: Help needed with 2FA two-factor authentication configuration on account

ticket.subject: Server 503 error
ticket.description: Getting 503 service unavailable error. Important and blocking work

ticket.subject: Wrong invoice total
ticket.description: Invoice amount incorrect. Please review billing charges

ticket.subject: Keyboard shortcut feature
ticket.description: Request for keyboard shortcuts enhancement to improve productivity

ticket.subject: Null pointer exception
ticket.description: Application throws null pointer exception error. Bug occurs on reports tab
